data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for user input sanitization.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where all user input is sanitized or escaped. However, there is no direct evidence provided that demonstrates this requirement has been implemented or tested. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific checks or validations related to input sanitization, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of input sanitization or escaping being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify input sanitization.
